title: 菊花賞の後に・青空を駆けた雲

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky dashes into the spotlight and wins the
Kikuka Sho, the third race of the Classic Triple
Crown. The audience roars at the sound defeat of
her incredible opponent, Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky praises Special Week for her hard work
in the Classics. At the same time, the third
member of the big three, King Halo, watches in
frustration.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Seiun Sky is unsure of which race to do
next, on the way home she hears from a fan that
Grass Wonder will run in the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to live up to her fans' expectations,
defeat Grass Wonder, and become the best in her
generation, she sets her sights on the Arima
Kinen.
